# GitHub Copilot project instructions

See [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) at the repository root for architecture overview, conventions, build/test commands, and common pitfalls. Treat that file as the single source of truth.

Key reminders for code suggestions:

- Use the constants in `launchdarkly/keys.go` for schema attribute names — never inline string literals.
- New resources should generally use the plugin-framework path (`launchdarkly/plugin_provider.go`), not SDKv2.
- Wrap LaunchDarkly API calls in `client.withConcurrency(ctx, ...)`.
- Don't edit `launchdarkly/integration_configs_generated.go` or anything in `docs/` — they're regenerated by `make generate`.
- PR titles must follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (enforced by CI).
